title: Racosperma wickhamii

The health benefits of Racosperma wickhamii include its use as a natural remedy for wound healing, skin conditions, and inflammation due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Racosperma wickhamii include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
taxonomy: Racosperma wickhamii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the subgenus Acacia and the genus Racosperma.
